headline: Comcast (CMCSA) Agrees To $117.5 Million Xfinity Data Breach Settlement
summary: Comcast has agreed to pay $117.5 million to settle a class-action lawsuit tied to a cybersecurity breach affecting Xfinity customers. The breach exposed personal data for millions of users, raising concerns about data protection and customer privacy. The settlement, which is still subject to court approval, includes payouts and credit monitoring for impacted customers. For investors watching Comcast, ticker NasdaqGS:CMCSA, the settlement adds a fresh governance and risk consideration...
